title: S. palustris Leaves Sampling and RNA Extraction
author: Maria Stefanie Dwiyanti
materials: Add leaf materials into mortar. Wipe RNAlater left on leaves using kimwipe. The amount of leaves from the 50 ml tubes. 6 ml extraction buffer or more will be enough for the leaves.

steps.title: Prepare RNAlater solution in 50 ml falcon tubes
steps.instruction: Prepare RNAlater solution in 50 ml falcon tubes. RNAlater Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #AM7020

steps.title: Choose young leaves without fiber
steps.instruction: Choose young leaves without fiber. Cut leaves into small pieces into the RNAlater solution. Proportion of leaves and RNAlater solution should be maximum 1:5. Amount of leaves in RNAlater solution

steps.title: Store 50 ml tubes inside ice box/ice packs for shipment
steps.instruction: Store 50 ml tubes inside ice box/ice packs for shipment.

steps.title: Leaves in RNAlater storage can be...
steps.instruction: Leaves in RNAlater storage can be stored at 4°C up to 1 month. After that, leaves will show reddish color. It is difficult to extract RNA from reddish color leaves.

steps.title: Warm CTAB extraction buffer to 65°C...
steps.instruction: Warm CTAB extraction buffer to 65°C (in water bath or beaker with warm water).

steps.title: Add liquid nitrogen to mortar
steps.instruction: Add liquid nitrogen to mortar. Quickly crush plant material to fine powder. Keep adding liquid nitrogen while crushing, to keep plant material frozen.

steps.title: Add 1 spatula of sample powder...
steps.instruction: Add 1 spatula of sample powder to 1 ml warm CTAB buffer in 2 ml tubes. Vortex to mix the material and buffer, make sure no clumps. Add more CTAB buffer if needed.

steps.title: Add 700 µL chloroform:isoamylalcohol (24:1)
steps.instruction: Add 700 µL chloroform:isoamylalcohol (24:1). Vortex to mix.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 15,000 rpm, 10 min, 4C
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 15,000 rpm, 10 min, 4C

steps.title: Repeat step 9-11 twice (total 3 times)
steps.instruction: Repeat step 9-11 twice (total 3 times). At this stage the upper phase should be greenish-clear color.

steps.title: Add 500 µL of 8 M...
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL of 8 M LiCl, mix by inverting tubes several times.

steps.title: Prepare ice in a styrofoam box
steps.instruction: Prepare ice in a styrofoam box. Put tubes in ice and store overnight at 4℃ (ideally 12-15 hours, before solution turns red)

steps.title: Centrifuge at 15,000 rpm, 45 min, 4℃
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 15,000 rpm, 45 min, 4℃. (Thaw DNAseI buffer while waiting).

steps.title: White-transparent pellet should appear at bottom
steps.instruction: White-transparent pellet should appear at bottom. Discard supernatant using pipette.

steps.title: Add 80% cold ethanol 50 µL
steps.instruction: Add 80% cold ethanol 50 µL.

steps.title: Centrifuge 15,000 rpm, 5 min, 4℃
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 15,000 rpm, 5 min, 4℃.

steps.title: Dissolve pellet in 270 µL DNase-RNAse free water
steps.instruction: Dissolve pellet in 270 µL DNase-RNAse free water. Pellet from 6 tubes can be combined into 1 tube.

steps.title: Add 27 µL of 10×DNase I buffer to solution
steps.instruction: Add 27 µL of 10×DNase I buffer to solution. Add also 2 µL of DNase I (RNase free) and 1 µL of RNase inhibitor.

steps.title: Incubate at 37℃、30 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate at 37℃、30 minutes.

steps.title: Add 300 µl of phenol:chloroform:isoamylalcohol (25:24:1), invert tubes to mix
steps.instruction: Add 300 µl of phenol:chloroform:isoamylalcohol (25:24:1), invert tubes to mix.

steps.title: Centrifuge 15,000 rpm, 3 min, 4℃
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 15,000 rpm, 3 min, 4℃.

steps.title: Transfer supernatant to new 1
steps.instruction: Transfer supernatant to new 1.5 ml tube, add 300 µL of chloroform:isoamylalcohol invert tubes to mix.

steps.title: Centrifuge 15,000 rpm, 3 min, 4℃
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 15,000 rpm, 3 min, 4℃.

steps.title: Transfer supernatant to new 1
steps.instruction: Transfer supernatant to new 1.5 ml tube, 30 µL of 3M NaOAc and 700 µl of 99.5% ethanol (4°C), mix well by inverting tubes.

steps.title: Store in -30℃, overnight
steps.instruction: Store in -30℃, overnight.

steps.title: Centrifuge 15,000 rpm, 45 min, 4℃
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 15,000 rpm, 45 min, 4℃.

steps.title: Discard supernatant using pipette
steps.instruction: Discard supernatant using pipette. White-transparent pellet should appear at the bottom of tube.

steps.title: Add 100 µL of 80％ ethanol (4℃),
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL of 80％ ethanol (4℃),

steps.title: Centrifuge 15,000 rpm, 3 min, 4℃
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 15,000 rpm, 3 min, 4℃ .

steps.title: Add 50 µL of water to dissolve pellet
steps.instruction: Add 50 µL of water to dissolve pellet.

steps.title: Quantify with Nanodrop and check quality using gel electrophoresis
steps.instruction: Quantify with Nanodrop and check quality using gel electrophoresis

steps.title: Store RNA at -80°C
steps.instruction: Store RNA at -80°C.

steps.title: Transfer upper phase to new 1
steps.instruction: Transfer upper phase to new 1.5 ml tube.

steps.title: Discard solution using pipette, open tubes...
steps.instruction: Discard solution using pipette, open tubes on ice to dry pellet (a few minutes).
